description:
Parent epic fz-rh2.21 has the full design; eli5.html at the repo root is the design doc; requires fz-rh2.21.1-.3 landed. This ticket makes ReturnType a CUMULATIVE claim in fact: the store joins, descent is unrepresentable without rebase, and a widening operator bounds every ascent. This is the single change that kills the quicksort oscillation (the self-read can no longer descend, so the append-key flip happens once and never reverses; the round that reads a transiently absent callee joins lower-into-higher, publishes changed=false, and stops waking itself).

THE JOIN. ActivationMap::define_return (src/compiler2/semantic.rs, ActivationSlot) over the Option<Ty> evidence installed by fz-rh2.21.3:
- rebased completion (flag from fz-rh2.21.2): REPLACE stored with computed; reset the ascent counter; changed = !equal.
- non-rebased: stored None -> take computed; computed None -> unchanged (no evidence adds nothing); equal -> unchanged (changed=false — the scheduler invariant "republishing with changed=false should not wake subscribers" is load-bearing; guard equality BEFORE joining); else stored = WIDEN_JOIN(stored, computed), changed accordingly.
- WIDEN_JOIN below the delay threshold is plain types.union(a, b) — NOT refine_widen. Three verified reasons, write them in the doc-comment: refine_widen is not idempotent on mixed descrs (re-widening equal values manufactures spurious changed=true); it drops mismatched ClosureLits (losing closure identity blinds resolve_escaping_callable_activations_from_type and downstream materialize_call_edges fails fatally with incomplete call edges); it unions arrow arguments covariantly, which is wrong for the contravariant position. Plain union preserves closure conjuncts.

THE WIDENING (the ladder must end). ActivationSlot gains an ascent counter: incremented on every strictly-ascending non-rebased join (changed=true path); reset on rebase. When the counter exceeds N, apply a structural widening to the join result before storing: collapse the growing spine via the existing convergence_class (src/compiler2/types/mod.rs — collapses pure list shapes to list(any)) generalized as needed so the deepening fixture below terminates; document the operator next to refine_widen. N: define const RETURN_WIDENING_DELAY with pencil value 8, and DERIVE it before finishing: the define emits the ascent count as a telemetry measurement on the existing fz.compiler2.return_type.defined event (raw value, conformant with telemetry rules) plus a distinct fz.compiler2.return_type.widened event when the operator engages; run the full fixture corpus and the matrix, record the observed maximum ascent (expected 2-4) in the constant's doc-comment, and set N to roughly 4x that. The corpus must NEVER engage widening — add a matrix-level or drive_test assertion that the widened event count is zero across existing fixtures, so any future engagement on a real program is a visible regression instead of silent precision loss (widening costs ABI precision: wider returns box into ValueRef).

THE FIXTURE. Add a deepening-recursion fixture (the canonical divergent ascent): a function shaped like fn f(x), do: [f(x)] reached from main, plus a drive_test that compiles it to DriveOutcome::Resolved (not TimedOut), asserts the widened event fired, and asserts the settled return is the widened form. Today this program only stops via the 5-second CLI drive timeout; after this ticket termination is by construction.

CLEANUPS IN THE SAME COMMIT: prepare_function_call's read of the store is already Option (fz-rh2.21.3); delete any leftover bottom-special-casing in merge helpers that the Option join obsoleted; ensure define_activation_return's telemetry carries the raw Option (opaque) and the ascent measurement.

TESTS (TDD):
- semantic.rs store tests: join laws (None identity both sides; equality short-circuit produces changed=false; union ascends; closure-lit-bearing types survive the join with identity intact — construct two closure types and assert the joined descr still yields callable_value_clauses); rebase replaces and resets the counter; counter increments only on strict ascent.
- drive_test: the deepening fixture as above. The quicksort fixture: drive to Resolved and assert via a capture handler that no ReturnType fact revision exceeded a small bound (e.g. 8) — this is the invariant the runaway violated 32,356 times (full convergence pinning expands in fz-rh2.21.5).
Acceptance: green per epic baseline, zero warnings, corpus-widening-count zero, one commit.
title: semantic analysis: cumulative ReturnType join with widening-with-delay
